name: Silent Watch
description: The Arcloft Syndicate sees everything and is seen by none. Eight missions of surveillance, stealth, and precision strikes.

missions.name: Eyes Open
missions.briefing: Establish a surveillance network across the contested zone before other factions realise what is happening.

missions.name: Data Harvest
missions.briefing: Stormrend's communication infrastructure holds valuable intelligence. Extract it.
objectives: Extract the intelligence via Patch Drone
missions.twist: Stormrend will detect the Patch Drone if it moves too slowly — keep it moving.

missions.name: The Ironmarch Files
missions.briefing: Ironmarch is building something secret. Arcloft reconnaissance reveals it must be destroyed.
objectives: Destroy the secret Ironmarch construction site
missions.twist: Ironmarch will call for Kragmore armour support if the attack takes longer than 8 minutes.

missions.name: Archipelago Silence
missions.briefing: Arcloft submarine units will cut naval communication cables between enemy island bases.
objectives: Deploy Phantom Submarines to cut 3 cable nodes
Avoid detection by enemy naval patrols
missions.twist: Kragmore naval patrols will detect sonar pings — move submarines carefully between patrols.

missions.name: The Valkyr Gambit
missions.briefing: Valkyr is close to discovering Arcloft's network. A counter-intelligence operation must discredit them.
objectives: Plant false intelligence at the Valkyr HQ
missions.twist: Patch Drones can plant false intelligence but will be destroyed if detected.

missions.name: Eyes Everywhere
missions.briefing: Expand the Aether Relay network to cover all six faction territories simultaneously.
objectives: Establish relay coverage over all 6 spawn zones
Survive attacks from 3 factions for 15 minutes
missions.twist: Each faction will attempt to destroy Arcloft relays in their territory.

missions.name: Quantum Silence
missions.briefing: Activate the Quantum Detection Grid — which will blind all enemy surveillance permanently.
missions.twist: All factions will send forces to stop the Grid from activating — this is Arcloft's most dangerous operation.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: Arcloft has seen everything. Now it is time to act. The Cordite Nexus must be seized — silently.
objectives: Capture the Cordite Nexus without triggering a multi-faction coalition
Establish a Refinery before any other faction
missions.twist: If Arcloft is seen capturing the Nexus by more than 2 factions simultaneously, all will attack.
